sections.paragraph:
Original: קוּט

Transliteration: qûṭ

Phonetic: koot

BDB Definition:

  1. to loathe, be grieved, feel a loathing
    1. (Qal) to feel a loathing
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to feel loathing against self
      2. to detest
    3. (Hithpolel) to loathe oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1996

Part(s) of speech: Verb
